channel.title: CODRA — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by CODRA (codra).

item.title: CVE-2026-4761 · 3.3 LOW — Unnecessary permissions on private keys of certificates installed by Network and Security Wizard
item.description: When a certificate and its private key are installed in the Windows machine certificate store using Network and Security tool, access rights to the private key are unnecessarily granted to the operator group. * Installations based on Panorama Suite 2…

item.title: CVE-2026-4760 · 7.7 HIGH 🌩️ — Potential unauthorized access to files on the Web HMI server host
item.description: From Panorama Web HMI, an attacker can gain read access to certain Web HMI server files, if he knows their paths and if these files are accessible to the Servin process execution account. * Installations based on Panorama Suite 2022-SP1 (22.50.005) a…
